Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1818 "CYBERDYNEWARRIOR-4400-1818" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $4400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cyberdyne Warrior.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
To allow a quicker start of the game, added an init routine at $4400 which:
1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Copies 512 bytes of code and data back down to $0200, so that the game could be dumped from $0400 3. Sets $DD00 to $96
Note: the game does not hit $1818 on the first run because the game was actually frozen using an Action Replay! Therefore, you must set the breakpoint on $1818, start the game. Then once you die, the breakpoint will be hit and you can dump from there.
The loading screen is by Steve Rowlands, but was never used in the finished game. It was kindly shared with the Games That Weren't team in 2008.
